fields.name: color
fields.description: A color chosen for this `ActivityGroup` to visually group different `Activities` or `ActivityGroups` in a schedule for example.

fields.name: id
fields.description: The universally unique identifier for this `ActivityGroup`

fields.name: bookable
fields.description:
Information on _whether_ and _how_ this `Activity` is bookable.

  If this field is `null` this `Activity` is _not_ bookable.
  This can have multiple reasons:
  - This `Activity` is not itself an individually _bookable unit_, but just a part of an `ActivityGroup` which has to be booked as a whole.
  - This `Activity` is _archived_ or _cancelled_
  - The `PublicationState` of its `ActivityGroup` is not `ACTIVE`

  If this field is _not_ `null` this `Activity` is generally bookable.
  Note that further restriction like a registration window or a limitation of spots can still apply.

fields.name: end
fields.description: The end of this `Activity` provided in the `DateOutput` format

fields.name: hasOnlineStream
fields.description: Whether this `Activity` has an online stream

fields.name: id
fields.description: The universally unique identifier for this `Activity`

fields.name: isArchived
fields.description:
Whether this `Activity` is _archived_.
  An `Activity` can be _archived_ if the `ActivityGroup` containing it was archived or deleted as a whole or the individual `Activity` itself was deleted.

fields.name: limited
fields.description:
Information on _whether_ and _how_ this `Activity` has limited spots for participants.

  If This field is `null` this individual `Activity` is _not_ limited
  This can have multiple reasons:
  - This `Activity` is part of an `ActivityGroup` which is limited as a whole, like a _Course_
  - This `Activity` allows for unlimited participants, like e.g. an online class

  If this field is _not_ `null` this `Activity` has a limited number of spots for participants.
  This can be the case for individually bookable `Activities` of e.g. a _Class_ or also for the `Activities` in an `ActivityGroup` like e.g. a _Workshop_ using [Tickets](https://help.eversportsmanager.com/ticket-system-for-workshops-courses-and-events-eversports-help-center).

fields.name: location
fields.description:
The physical location at which this `Activity` will happen.

  Note that e.g. a _Class_ "Yoga in the Park" might happen at a location different from the `Location` of the `Venue`.

fields.name: name
fields.description:
A name for this specific `Activity`.
    Note that not all `Activities` have a specific name. If the name is `null` you can infer its name from the name of the `ActivityGroup`.

    E.g. an `ActivityGroup` called “Morning Yoga” might have `Activities` without specific names, all `Activities` are generic “Morning Yoga” `Activities`.
    But an `ActivityGroup` called “Beginners Course” might contain `Activities` individually named “Week 1 - Basics”, “Week 2 - Breathing”,…

fields.name: start
fields.description: The start of this `Activity` provided in the `DateOutput` format
